data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having a configurable stage model with stage transition history. However, the evidence provided does not include any information regarding the existence of a stage model or its transition history, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical information means that the requirement is not met, as there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this aspect.
gaps: No evidence of a configurable stage model or stage transition history.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define stage model and transition history endpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the stage model is configurable and that transition history is recorded.
